title: Oracle, CoreWeave lead AI selloff on OpenAI growth concerns
description: Shares of artificial intelligence-related firms ​dropped on Tuesday after the Wall Street Journal reported that OpenAI had missed its goals for new users and revenue in ‌recent months, raising concerns over the ChatGPT creator's growth prospects.

title: Poland Sees Rising Cyberattacks With Spread of Advanced AI Tools
description: Poland, which is battling a rising number of cyberattacks from Russia, expects online threats to intensify as more advanced artificial intelligence tools spread, according to a senior government official.
content:

title: Report: Google Signs Classified AI Deal With Pentagon
description: Alphabet's Google joined a growing list of technology firms to sign a deal with the U.S. Department of Defense to use its artificial intelligence models for classified work, according to a report.

title: AI spending set to hit $600 billion
description: Big Tech has spent hundreds of billions of dollars over three years to power the artificial intelligence boom. But investors still want one answer: will all this pay off?
content:
April 28 (Reuters) - Big Tech has spent hundreds of billions of dollars over three years to power the artificial intelligence boom. But investors still want one answer: will all this pay off?

title: USD 15 bn Google data centre to transform Vizag into AI hub: Union Min Vaishnaw
description: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw on Tuesday highlighted Indias growing digital strength and said Visakhapatnam will emerge as an artificial intelligence hub with the upcoming USD 15 billion Google AI data centre. He said these initiatives reflect the Union governments commitment to transform Andhra Pradesh into a major railway and logistics hub, driving economic growth and regional integration.
content: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw on Tuesday highlighted India's growing digital strength and said Visakhapatnam will emerge as an artificial intelligence hub with the upcoming USD 15 billion Google AI data centre. Speaking at the foundation laying cer... [5379 chars]

title: Javishth Chabria Delivers Keynote at Cannes' World AI Film Festival, Showcases Simulation
description: Cannes/ Paris [France]/ Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], April 28: In a significant moment for India's presence in the global AI and cinema landscape, filmmaker and AI entrepreneur Javishth Chabria delivered a keynote at the World AI Film Festival (WAIFF) held in Cannes, France. The event, which attracted over 5,500 film submissions from more than 80 countries, served as a global platform for innovation at the intersection of artificial intelligence and filmmaking.

title: EAM Jaishankar meets UNGA President Baerbock in New Delhi; discusses UN reforms, global challenges

title: Google begins construction of its massive AI center in India
description: This is a $15 billion investment aimed at “delivering a complete artificial intelligence ecosystem”
content:
Google officially began today the construction in India of its largest artificial intelligence center outside the United States.
